verdict.summary: Round 1's major finding is resolved: the captured-age lookup now fails explicitly when AGE_OPERAND_ENC lacks CAPTURED_AGE, so the cross-file consistency assertion can no longer pass vacuously. The two tests read the committed site sources, require a non-empty age map, compare every parsed map entry and the capture-script operand against the native encoder, and then compare the captured operand against the required matching map entry. No new correctness, soundness, test-validity, or security issue is evident in the diff. I could not execute the focused Rust test because cargo is unavailable in this checkout environment, but the reviewed logic is direct and complete.
